query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN producto = 'OPIOIDES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as opioides_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN producto = 'OPIOIDES' AND tipo = 'Fijo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as opioides_fijo_count
FROM anuncios;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN producto = 'OPIOIDES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as opioides_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN producto = 'OPIOIDES' AND tipo = 'Fijo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as opioides_fijo_count
FROM anuncios;
